quick_skim.title: HySpecPro: Scalable Hypergraph Partitioning via Spectral Projection Optimization
quick_skim.abstract: Modern VLSI designs comprise tens of billions of components, making scalable hypergraph partitioning critical for parallel and hierarchical optimization. Although multilevel partitioning remains the dominant paradigm, its coarsening stage can distort structural information, especially in hypergraphs with many high-degree hyperedges, leading to increased refinement overhead and limited scalability. Recent approaches incorporate spectral information to guide coarsening, but only in a heuristic manner, without directly optimizing the partitioning objectives. We introduce HySpecPro, a single-level hypergraph partitioner that performs end-to-end optimization in a spectral embedding space. HySpecPro constructs embeddings from a bipartite Laplacian and performs efficient projection-based search, supported by a fully GPU-accelerated implementation. Experiments show that HySpecPro delivers cut quality comparable to state-of-the-art multilevel methods while scaling linearly with the total hyperedge degree.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: VLSI hypergraph partitioning for 3D IC design
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 面向3D集成电路设计的VLSI超图划分
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 面向3D集成电路设计的VLSI超图划分
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 面向3D集成电路设计的VLSI超图划分
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: HySpecPro uses spectral projection optimization for scalable hypergraph partitioning, directly supporting VLSI design for 3D integrated circuits.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现代VLSI设计包含数百亿组件，超图划分是并行和层次化优化的关键。本文提出HySpecPro，一种基于谱投影优化的单层超图划分器，通过端到端优化避免了多级划分中的结构信息失真。实验证明该方法可扩展且高效，直接支撑3D集成电路设计中的布局分区需求。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现代VLSI设计包含数百亿组件，超图划分是并行和层次化优化的关键。本文提出HySpecPro，一种基于谱投影优化的单层超图划分器，通过端到端优化避免了多级划分中的结构信息失真。实验证明该方法可扩展且高效，直接支撑3D集成电路设计中的布局分区需求。
